name: eot
documentation:
# Eons Official Time

Just a simple stardate implementation, the eons way ;)

Minimum precision is roughly 317 microseconds.
i.e. with a stardate like 2023.4657762834, the current time should be 20,234,657,762,834 * 317.097920 microseconds since year 0.
...
EOT

methods.name: eot.eot.EOT.GetStardate
documentation: RETURNS the current time as a stardate with 8 decimal point precision.

methods.name: eot.eot.EOT.__call__
documentation: Called when executing this as a functor.
